sequence_title: Photosynthesis: From Process Understanding to Global Judgement

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to Material M1 (text), Material M2 (worked_example), Material M3 (sample_output), and Material M4 (checklist).
timeline.learner_actions: Study Material M1 and M2 to understand the photosynthesis process. Review Material M3 to see a model explanation. Write an independent explanation and self-check using Material M4.
timeline.transition_to_next: Carry forward your explanation to support deeper analysis of how stages connect.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to Material M5 (text), Material M6 (comparison_table), and Material M7 (checklist).
timeline.learner_actions: Read Material M5 to understand both stages. Complete Material M6 by filling in missing details. Use Material M7 to verify accuracy and revise.
timeline.transition_to_next: Use your completed table to analyse how energy and matter behave across the process.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to Material M8 (worked_example), Material M9 (analysis_table), and Material M10 (checklist).
timeline.learner_actions: Study Material M8 to see how analysis is structured. Complete Material M9 by distinguishing energy and matter transformations. Verify using Material M10.
timeline.transition_to_next: Apply your analytical understanding to evaluate misconceptions.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to Material M11 (scenario), Material M12 (decision_table), Material M13 (checklist), and Material M14 (transfer_prompt).
timeline.learner_actions: Evaluate claims in Material M11. Complete Material M12 with reasoning. Check responses using Material M13. Extend thinking using Material M14.
timeline.transition_to_next: Shift focus from misconceptions to ecosystem-level implications.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to Material M15 (text), Material M16 (classification_table), and Material M17 (checklist).
timeline.learner_actions: Read Material M15 to understand ecosystem roles. Complete Material M16. Verify using Material M17 and refine explanation of energy flow.
timeline.transition_to_next: Integrate process knowledge and ecosystem understanding for global judgement.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to Material M18 (scenario), Material M19 (decision_table), Material M20 (template), Material M21 (checklist), Material M22 (transfer_prompt), and Material M23 (consolidation_summary).
timeline.learner_actions: Analyse both scenarios using Material M18. Complete Material M19. Construct a reasoned explanation using Material M20. Verify using Material M21. Extend judgement with Material M22. Complete consolidation summary in Material M23.
timeline.transition_to_next: Session closure is integrated through the consolidation summary, consolidating learning and final judgement.
